deviation_note: Nevada courts may adjust the base obligation under NAC 425.150 based on discretionary factors (special needs, relative income of both households, time-sharing costs, obligor's ability to pay, etc.) -- there is no mandatory shared-placement formula like some other states. This calculator does not model the low-income schedule (NAC 425.145), which is republished annually by the Administrative Office of the Courts based on federal poverty guidelines and is not part of the codified regulation text itself.
